After a lengthy stop, they are able to bypass the bandh as they masquerade as a wedding party, as bandhs unofficially allow wedding vehicles through their protests. The passengers are able fortuitously to come up with this masquerade as the one acting as the bride is indeed going to Kathmandu to get engaged. The stories of those on board, some whose the delay help, some whose it hurts, are told. The "bride", medical student Pooja, is torn between marrying her intended fiancé Abiral, just returned from the United States and who she's known since they were children, and her lover Ronit. The "groom", Pratiek, whose parents do not approve of his homosexual orientation, has a new boyfriend Vishal, who is facing a personal crisis with his transgendered roommate, Deena. The "wedding planner", Manoj, who is in the military, is rushing to see his housemaid wife Radhika before the effects of a fertility concoction he just took wears off, he unaware of things that are happening with her in relation to having a baby. The driver's party girl girlfriend, Kavita, is facing an issue between seeing that her ill daughter gets medical attention and having no money to pay for the services. Their collective lives get even more intertwined beyond their direct interactions on the bus with one specific incident that happens at their destination.

plot: Nepalese romance drama film directed by Milan Chams.

title: Ranveer
plot: Ranveer (Sushil Sitaula) is a young, energetic and straightforward guy from Dhangadhi and is in love with Maya (Supushpa Bhatta). He faces emotional breakdown after a life changing incident and he moves to Kathmandu. In Kathmandu, he meets Priya (Subeksha Khadka), daughter of a powerful man. Ranveer and Priya fall in love. Meanwhile, Ranveer finds out culprits of 'life changing incident' and he embarks on a journey of revenge.

title: Sunpani
plot: A social drama unpacking the immediate cultural fallout, cast structures.

title: Lukamari
plot: Based on a police investigation of a murder case of a school girl Rupa K.C. The case gets connected to the tenants of Musya Sahu and the hide and seek between cops and criminals starts. Two undercover veteran crime investigating agents meet co-incidentally and start sharing a same room in some place in Kathmandu valley.

title: Panchayat
plot: Based in Nepalese panchayat system.

title: Kutu Ma Kutu
plot: two everyday misfits lose a rare two rupee note containing a vital code.

title: Adhikar
plot: A classical family drama analyzing inheritance rights and gender dynamics.

title: Basain
plot: A poor farmer Dhane and his family suffer one calamity after another, and a series of quarrels with fellow villagers forces them to leave the village.

title: Numafung
plot: The film highlights the changing lives and ways of the Limbu people, an ethnic minority residing in rural eastern Nepal. It is a story of a young Limbu girl's struggle with cultural traditions, the impact of local medical practices on her life, and the effect of her actions on her community. The struggles of Numa, the young girl, represent the lives of many other young Nepali women, torn between fulfilling her desires and cultural traditions.

title: Jha lo
plot: Year of the Bird is a story of two monks; one young and another old, with similar conflict, guilt and anger.

title: Batomuni Ko Phool
plot: A critically acc;aimed musical social drama that tackles entrenched caste discrimination.

title: Pooja
plot: Pooja Singh Thakuri Rai, 17, of Saune - Sunsari is dead. Pooja's father, Gaj Bahadur Singh Thakuri, blames Pooja's mother-in-law, Harkamaya Rai, for killing Pooja. Pooja's husband, Rumihang, blames Pooja's father Gaj Bahadur for contributing to Pooja's death. Harkamaya blames the hospitals for killing Pooja. Ranju Yadav, one of Pooja's best friends, thinks Pooja invited disaster because she was, at heart, an unhappy and lonely young woman. Who is really responsible for Pooja's death? How does Pooja died? The film Pooja is an attempt on exploring the answer, why does hundreds of mother dying every year? This is story about one of life's biggest and riskiest endeavors: giving birth to a baby - being told from three different points of views. All improvised acting with no scripted dialogues! A BBC World Service Trust Nepal's presentation, Pooja is produced with financial assistance of European Union.

title: Markyu
plot: In Markyu, Banmaya and Maite brother sister who lost their parent at childhood. It presents how the Markyu or Goldwater is used in among the Gurung community in daily life basis with Banmaya sister of Maite, how she sacrificed her needs and wisdom for the sake of her brother.

title: Mango Pickle
plot: A series of events land a timid college kid in over his head after he is coerced by his friends into visiting a brothel in MANGO PICKLE, a gritty coming of age tale set amidst the Dashain Hindu festival in Kathmandu.

title: Bir Bikram
plot: Bir decides to save his crush June for his friend since he had promised to save her.

title: Dasdhunga
plot: Based on true events of the mysterious death of CPN-UML leader Madan Bhandari in Dashdhunga, Nepal.

title: Panche Baja
plot: An a actor has a romance over someone's wife while he is in foreign country.

title: Mohani
plot: A historical milestone of classic cinema highlighting emotional family ties, betrayal, and the deep-seated cultural complexities of love and devotion.

title: Janma Bhoomi
plot: A patriotic narrative exploring sacrifice, displacement, and community defense as citizens fight for the dignity of their homeland.

title: First Love
plot: A youthful urban romance tracking a tight-knit group of friends as they navigate infatuation, complex love triangles, and coming-of-age realizations.

title: Raato Ghar
plot: Rato Ghar revolves around Jhakhmale (Wilson), Tukki (Gaurav Pahari), Korean (Anurag Kuwar) and Kartikey (Sanyam Puri) and shows their crime drama unconventionally. It is a social drama movie covering comedy, action and thriller that shows bad effects of ambition of money.

title: Kafal Pakyo
plot: When a guy get a marriage date but while going to the location he encounters many weird stuff.

title: Mero Euta Saathi Cha
plot: Jay is too spoiled to inherit his grandfather's vast wealth. When he fails to graduate from college, his grandfather's will sends him back to his ancestral village where, long ago, he made a friend. Shikha, Jay's estranged childhood friend, helps Jay rediscover his humanity. But, Shikha is very sick. She shared her dreams with Jay - to rebuild the orphanage where she lives. Jay realizes that this life where he can choose nothing, where money buys nothing important, is dearer to him than a full of privilege. Can he save Shikha and marry her? Will their dream come true? Will Jay re-inherit his ancestral wealth?

title: Paral Ko Aago
plot: A wife goes to her maternal house after being beaten by her husband. The husband then seeks her out.

title: A Mero Hajur
plot: A romantic musical that portrays a deep emotional connection, structural family friction, and the sacrifices required to honor true love.

title: Kathmandude
plot: A burnt-out American globetrotter stumbles upon a psychedelic adventure in Kathmandu.

title: Je Bho Ramrai Bho
plot: A highly engaging social comedy tracking the domestic disputes, humorous misunderstandings, and ultimate wisdom found in embracing life's chaotic turns.

title: DristiBhram
plot: Aman Nepal has an incident which he doesn't remember. With a series of hallucinations, he is struggling to remember what happened the other night.

title: Jeevan Rekha
plot: An early milestone in commercial Nepali storytelling that captures shifting generational dynamics, honor, and deep family bonds.

title: Kasle Choryo Mero Man
plot: Manavi father forces her to get married to his billionaire partner's son so they can become the richest person in Nepal,at the marriage Manavi runs away.

title: Gangster Blues
plot: In this corrupted world Youth have a lot of reasons to turn into criminals but when you have someone special you love there will be much more consequences that needs to be faced.Story revolves around two protagonists.

title: Swarga
plot: A landmark emotional family drama exploring the breakdown of domestic harmony, greed among siblings, and a parent's ultimate sacrifice to restore their home as "heaven."

title: Mokshya
plot: A promising musician lives through his shattered dreams, friendship and love, when he gets injured in a group attack.

title: Nepal Idol
plot: Nepal Idol is the first International franchise in Nepalese television history. Nepal Idol reality singing competition that is part of the Idols franchise created by Simon Fuller and owned by 19 Entertainment and FremantleMedia. AP1 TV acquired the production and broadcast right for Nepal Idol. The series aims to find new solo recording artists from across Nepal and the winner would be decided by viewers' votes through the Internet, telephone and text messages.

title: Birami Sahar (Sick City)
plot: Story of a poor guy named Krishna who enters the world of drugs for fast and easy money and a luxurious life but sometimes things don't work out they way you want them to.

title: Garud Puran
plot: A situational comedy detailing the chaotic schemes and financial struggles of working-class friends trying to make quick money through unconventional means.

title: Uma
plot: Set in the early 2000s, Uma is a story about Uma, her brother Milan and their widow mother living in rural Nepal during the Maoist insurgency.

title: Tshering
plot: Set in the magnificent highlands, the film chronicles the trials, traditional values, and cultural endurance of the mountain communities of Nepal.

title: Pal
plot: A modern romantic drama unpacking the shifting emotional attachments, misunderstandings, and ultimate compromises made by a young couple.

title: Children of God
plot: A documentary which follows a group of siblings who eke out their existence from the offerings and other goods found in the sacred Bagmati River.

title: Jung Bahadur Ko Coat
plot: A high-stakes crime suspense thriller following a frantic chase centered around tracking down a historically priceless antique coat.

title: Aafno Manchhe
plot: A highly popular family melodrama mapping out domestic loyalty, generational sacrifices, and the preservation of household integrity against external greed.

title: Himmatwali
plot: A female-led commercial drama profiling a courageous woman who stands tall to protect her family and counter village exploitation.

title: Karkash
plot: The story of a band named Karkash and the ups and downs of band members.

title: Aadi Kabi Bhanubhakta
plot: Historical biopic based on the life of Nepali poet Bhanubhakta Acharya.

title: Mission Paisa 2: Reloaded
plot: Madhav Wagle and Narendra Maharjan, the makers of blockbusters First Love, Loot and Chhadke are back with director Simosh Sunuwar in this roller coaster ride of action, adventure and hilarity. Join the mission to become a part of this fun-filled entertainer, coming to a theatre near you on February 27, 2015.

title: Chhadke
plot: The film tells the story of three childhood friends. The trio all had dreams to fulfill 'when they grew up', but time and destiny seem to have other plans for them. A difficult life is forced upon them when the elder brother of one of these three men is hit by the vehicle of a shady character called Chewang (Robin Tamang) and left completely paralyzed. The three friends then find themselves in the way of a criminal gang called 'Royal', of which Chewang is the leader.

title: Silu
plot: The first film made in Newari language, tells the story of a young man, who will do anything for the girl he loves.

title: Kumari
plot: A landmark early classic mapping deep indigenous values, socio-religious traditions, and the cultural canvas surrounding the Kathmandu valley.

title: Rupak Dotel & Anju Panta: Banki Chari
plot: A beautifully shot short musical narrative tracking emotional expressions and structural bonds through classical melodic patterns

title: Muskan
plot: A commercial romantic story emphasizing how youthful smiles, sudden encounters, and class differences shape deep personal relationships.

title: Mero Love Story
plot: Mero Love Story shows us how love can be different from person to person.

title: Gajalu
plot: Living goddess Kumari becomes friends with six people who enjoy happy lives.

title: Jaula Relaima
plot: Jaula Relaima perfectly captures the sad truth about Caste Discrimination and entails the story of true lover who decide to stay together after their renunciation from their family and society for their love.

title: Visa Girl
plot: A story of the freewheeling passion of youth set in modern day Nepal. It captures the candid journey of love, dedication, kindness, creativity and compassion of four strangers, all geared to actualize their due dreams. As they near achieving their ultimate target, they no longer think about the challenges of every day obstacles but push their selves to break free from the shackles of their limitations and in a process touch the souls of many others.

title: Singha Durbar
plot: An injured activist travels to meet his party's leader in the Prime Minister's office.

title: Apsara
plot: A classic narrative focused heavily on female identity, marital bonds, and standing tall against patriarchal structures in society.

title: Chhayan
plot: Chhayan is made on a story of a sexually abused young boy. This film is produced to aware parents, teacher and children themselves. As it is huge issues of any communities, countries and families, we tried to deliver the information in simple way so that every body could understand. This is Nepaly movie with English sub title.

title: Parva
plot: A character continuously carries out attacks for his self satisfaction, after an incident occurred at a festival.

title: Simarekha
plot: Story of Liglig people and their battle against Neighbouring State.

title: Dui Thopa Aansu
plot: A series of unfortunate events compels an unmarried woman to raise a child, not her own.

title: Last Nomads of Everest
plot: Last habitat at the top of world.

title: Basenji
plot: After his father is fired for writing a report on Nepal's agricultural industry, a young man has his life spiral into a nightmare as a series of mysterious and disturbing events plunges him deep into the horrifying secrets of his past.

title: Bandha Mayale
plot: A commercial romantic movie exploring the limits of trust, individual emotional baggage, and personal bonding choices in relationship .

title: Hasi Deu Ek Phera
plot: Hari, a simple villager who moves to city after his sister and her husband dies to help their son to move on from this incident.

title: The Commando
plot: An intense action film starring Raj Kumar Rai as an elite operative. During its original theatrical release run, its distribution faced sudden external political pressure from the Indian Embassy attempting to block its screening through the Ministry of Communication, though the director successfully fought the order and kept the film in theaters.

title: Lama La
plot: Jamyang is a young Buddhist monk who has recently finished his intermediate monastic education. He is now heading towards higher monastery for his higher education. In the course of his journey into the war-torn mountains, he meets a young rebel, Arjun. This is a story of their journey where they form an unlikely friendship that will change both of their lives.

title: Love? Lust? Life?
plot: A young poet takes a surrealistic plunge as he analyzes and constructs his poem in progress.

title: How Funny
plot: When Heera (Nisha Adhikari) goes missing and Police Inspector Rai (Dayahang Rai) is having difficulties in discovering her whereabouts. he then hires village girls Pushpa (Priyanka Karki) and Ramita (Keki Adhikari) in hopes he might solve the case with their assistance.

title: Dewar Babu
plot: A relative finds her lost relative after a long time when two thief find about this they portent to be their relative but they stay with forever.

title: Kathaa '72
plot: An aloof and a distant man learns the true meaning of' home' and also learns to see the women in his life in a new light before leaving his earthquake shattered country.

title: A Year
plot: We all want the best for our children. But how do we know our idea of the best is really for them?

title: Lahure
plot: Lahure is based on the story of the brave Gorkha soldiers and the sacrifices made by them and their families.

title: Rato Galbandi
plot: A romantic story centered on the life and emotional entanglements of a young couple, showcasing their relationship challenges, social dynamics, and comedic moments within a traditional village setting.

title: Chakkar
plot: A seemingly uneducated and unemployed individual is offered to kill a stranger's wife, as brutally as possible.

title: Silsila
plot: When a journalist nearly get killed from his enemy his mother and other people do everything to revive him up.

title: Jhumkee
plot: Jhumkee features suspense story on Women Violence in Nepal.

title: Biteka Pal
plot: A romantic drama revolving around the lives of two lovers, exploring the deep emotional bonds, painful sacrifices, and cherished memories of their past relationship as they navigate personal struggles and separation.

title: Dhoka
plot: The betrayal by a close friend who falls victim to drug addiction.

title: Sahasi Chori
plot: A 13-year-old Nepali girl leaves her Himalayan village seeking employment in the city with trusted friend Krishna, but becomes increasingly suspicious of his intentions when he asks her to cross the border with him to India. At a life-changing crossroads, she is forced to choose what she's willing to sacrifice for the good of both her family, and his.

title: Drawing the Tiger
plot: Filmed over seven years, Drawing The Tiger is a intimate portrait of a family in rural Nepal who get a chance to break their cycle of poverty: Their brightest child is awarded a scholarship to attend school in the city. When she doesn't return home, the family is forced to survive without her or the opportunity they believed would change their fate.

title: Jani Najani
plot: A modern romantic drama that explores the intricate relationship dynamics, emotional challenges, and misunderstandings between a young couple as they navigate love, trust, and personal ambitions.

title: Ko Afno
plot: This is a deeply involving drama depicting the desperation between a poor rural couple and a childless upper class urban couple, whose lives are forever altered when the rich couple buys the ingenuous poor couple's 3-year old son, on the promise of a better life. Son grows up emotionally disturbed and resorts to extreme measures to feel less alone.

title: November Rain
plot: Aayush falls in love with Sheetal at first sight, unaware that fate already had them together somewhere in the past.

title: Subha Love
plot: An astrological prediction about a couple's compatibility leads to unexpected complications, comedic misunderstandings, and emotional challenges as they attempt to navigate their relationship against the wishes of their families.

title: Pandorum
plot: An abstract, surreal journey following a traveler trapped within an enigmatic, shifting landscape where subconscious fears and haunting fantasies manifest, challenging their perception of reality.

title: Jai Shree Daam
plot: After finding himself in deep financial trouble in his village due to a predatory loan, a naive young man flees to Kathmandu. There, he accidentally discovers a lost cell phone containing a highly controversial video of a prominent religious leader engaged in a serious crime, prompting him and a friend to launch a high-stakes blackmail scheme that quickly spirals out of control.

title: Sammy Adventures
plot: A travel and adventure reality series hosted by Samriddhi Rai that showcases the natural beauty, cultural diversity, and outdoor sports of Nepal, following her journey through various scenic destinations across the country while experiencing local traditions and high-adrenaline activities.

title: Palash
plot: Samjhana,a middle class village girl wishes to marry a rich guy which later leads her to be sold at a brothel. The sweetness of her lover back from her village and the harshness of the brothel owner, after she's drowned into prostitution, are the major emotional ingredients of the movie.

title: Darpan Chhaya 2
plot: Directed by Tulsi Ghimire, Darpan Chaya 2 is the second part, but not a sequel, of the blockbuster movie Darpan Chaya (2001). With the concept of musical love story, the movie stars Puspa Khadka, Sahara Karki and Shraddha Parsai in the lead roles. The story tells a romantic love between a couple who enjoys each other company but, life has something else planned for them.

title: Nepal
plot: An intense action-drama centered around a fierce protagonist who fights against rampant corruption, cross-border criminal syndicates, and systemic injustice to protect the sovereignty and peace of the nation.

title: Thuldai
plot: A story of a normal village boy whose mother dies and brother gets lost in the city.

title: Fingerprint
plot: A suspenseful drama that delves into a complex criminal investigation where local authorities must piece together fragmented forensic evidence, hidden motives, and a web of secrets within a community to track down an elusive culprit.

title: Rumalai Chha Chino
plot: Based on a popular traditional song, this action-drama follows a courageous protagonist who stands up against localized injustice and oppression, weaving elements of regional folklore, duty, and community honor into a story of sacrifice and resilience.

title: Chameli
plot: CHAMELI: A FILM ABOUT GIRL TRAFFICKING IN NEPALChameli was once a trusting fifteen year old Nepali girl from a remote village in the Himalayas. Like most girls her age, she often dreamt of ...                See full synopsis »

title: Premleela
plot: A cross-border romantic drama that follows the emotional journey of a Nepali girl and an Indian boy as they navigate deep cultural differences, societal barriers, and personal sacrifices to protect their love.

title: Pahuna
plot: A mental patient is admitted in the hospital. Only cure he needs is someone to forgive him.

title: Love Sasha
plot: A girl (Keki Adhikari) starts to develop a afair with a young man (Karma Shayla) while waiting to get engaged with her long time boyfriend.

title: God Lives in the Himalayas
plot: In the Himalayan foothills, ten-year old Siddarth's mother is killed and his father burnt during a religious ceremony. Siddarth is shocked as to why God did this. The question consumes his mind and he searches for God to ask him why.

title: Ko Banchha Crorepati
plot: An Nepalese version of international show Who Wants to Be a Millionaire (1998).

title: Who Will Be a Gurkha
plot: A documentary following the grueling, rigorous six-month selection process in Pokhara, Nepal, where thousands of young Nepali men undergo intense physical and mental testing in hopes of securing one of the few coveted positions in the elite Gurkha regiment of the British Army.

title: Mausam
plot: A romantic drama following the life of Manav, a young man navigating the complex emotional shifting of love, family obligations, and personal responsibility against a backdrop of changing social dynamics.

title: Sukha Dukha
plot: A multi-generational drama that explores the intertwined lives, emotional struggles, and shifting priorities of a family as they navigate the inevitable joys and sorrows of daily life in a changing society.

title: Kina Ma? 2019
plot: A historical drama that explores the profound socioeconomic challenges, political landscape, and shifting cultural dynamics of Nepal during a transitional period in history, told through the perspectives of regular citizens navigating societal changes.

title: Teen Ghumti
plot: Indira, a girl from the ethnic group of Newars, falls in love with Pritambar, who is a Brahmin. She marries him, defying her parents. Pritambar has strong morals but lacks any sense of romance. He is involved with a group of revolutionaries who are planning protests against the autocratic rule. This group regularly meets at Pritambar's house and the members get to know Indira. When the security forces crack down on the revolutionary movement, Pritambar is imprisoned. Another member of the group, Roshan, comes to Indira's aid. He starts living with her and soon falls in love. Though she rejects his advances in the beginning, she eventually gives in. Their taboo relationship leads to Indira's pregnancy. With Pritambar due to be released, Indira is faced with a dilemma in her conservative society.

title: Saathi
plot: A classic romantic drama centering on Deepak, a dedicated and warm-hearted young man navigating the profound complexities of friendship, social class, and deep romantic devotion. As financial burdens, class disparities, and unexpected familial obligations threaten to tear two lovers apart, the story explores the enduring power of true companionship, sacrifice, and the emotional resilience required to overcome societal prejudice.

title: Commitment: 60 Hours
plot: Upcoming Nepalese action film.

title: The Sound of Silence
plot: In this video, layers of discommunication between a well-meaning American couple and a visiting Sherpa man, compounded with the dilemma of the Nepalese filmmaker who is caught in between as interpreter, prompt the viewer to review the limits to language and communication. Innocent discussions about food and culture reveal much about relative positions, through statements that could only be made through untranslated remarks and silences.

title: Hamro Team
plot: A disparate group of young football players from various social backgrounds must overcome personal differences, economic hardships, and deep-seated prejudices to build a unified team and achieve victory on the pitch.

title: Bhedako Oon Jasto
plot: Bright, genial, and intensely energetic, Narayan Wagle is one of Nepal's most widely followed journalists. Now the man, who has made a career writing about others, finds himself as a character in a story. Bhedako Oon Jasto, or Like Sheep's Wool, an hour long documentary, is named after the song he first heard in a highland village north of Kathmandu. It is his deeply personal odyssey in search of the elusive tune. For eight long years, Wagle would sing Bhedako Oon Jasto - to his friends, and then singers and musicians, to check if they were familiar with the tune, but to no avail. Early this year, Wagle has his calls answered. Wagle sings the song to Amrit Gurung of Nepathya. Amrit shows interest to sing the song, and requests Wagle to give him the lyrics in writing. Wagle puts forward a clause - he tells Amrit - " Both you and me have to revisit the place where I heard this song. You need to get the feel of the local essence, and I need to know more on the people and place - to write the song." The travel is agreed upon. Danu - the current bassist of Nepathya, follows them to observe the tunes of the Tungna. For 10 days, Nepathya (Amrit Gurung and Danu), travels with Wagle to the highland village in Langtang. A part-time filmmaker Kiran Krishna Shrestha follows the research process on the search of the song - Bhedako Oon Jasto... Kiran with his camera becomes the 'unseen' fourth character of the film.

title: Resham Filili
plot: Resham Filili follows the friendship, dreams, hopes and deeds of Resham and Hariya - both whethered by bad luck and misfortunes, must at any cost beat the oddest odds to save their lives from Dorje's men.

title: KTM Cocktale
plot: This film contains 4 days of the life of a drug dealer in Kathmandu.

title: Rahar
plot: A spirited young woman and an ambitious young man confront deep cultural divides, family expectations, and personal desires as they fight to protect their blossoming relationship against societal pressure.

title: Karma
plot: In a nunnery in the high desert mountains of Mustang, a revered abbess dies, leaving signs that she will be reborn in the precious human form. Prayers and ritual must be done to help her consciousness into its next rebirth, but the nunnery coffers are empty. The senior nuns decide that the only way out is get back money loaned out by the nunnery. A mysterious loan was made out to an equally mysterious Mr. Tashi who visited the senior nun in her last days. Given the shady rumours about Mr. Tashi, the nuns are convinced he took advantage of her in her dying state. Two nuns are assigned to retrieve the money; Karma, a free-spirited nun, and her opposite, a textbook-sort of nun called Sonam. They journey from the cloistered world of the high mountains, to the faraway cities of sin, to find the elusive Mr. Tashi.

title: The Contagious Apparitions of Dambarey Dendrite
plot: Dambarey is a street kid, who in a dendrite induced trance, turns invincible to outfox Kathmandu with his gang of five. Little does he know that his altered mind is playing wicked tricks to lead him and his friends to a place of no return.

title: Panchhi
plot: Every parent in this world loves his/her child very much. They are dearer than their own life and this is the truth. From childhood till he/she becomes an adolescent they have to think about their future, show them the right path giving useful guidelines from time to time, which will enable to lead a good life. When they reach high school and college, they share their life with the person they like and love. But in this 21st century, the young generation can differentiate between what is good and what is bad. They prefer their own choices. The living standard and financial position is a not a barrier between the two lovers.

title: Ketan Chettri: Lai Lai
plot: A newly married, lower-middle-class couple deeply in love experiences a strain on their relationship as they face intense emotional turmoil, societal stigma, and pressure from their community over their inability to conceive a child.

title: Tibetan Illusion Destroyer
plot: Tibetan Illusion Destroyer is a 3D short film documenting the Mani Rimdu Festival in Nepal. The festival originated in Tibet and is still performed in an authentic colorful ceremony in the shadow of Mount Everest. A modern day purpose of the festival is to destroy illusions that lead to emotional suffering. The film allows the viewer to experience a rare and sacred ceremony in the Himalaya Mountains with a path towards achieving happiness.

title: Ek Din Ek Raat
plot: A group of friends visiting a remote location find themselves trapped overnight in an isolated house, where they must confront a series of terrifying supernatural occurrences and dark secrets.

title: Adalat
plot: A fiery protagonist fights tirelessly against a corrupt legal system to secure justice for marginalized community members who have been falsely accused and stripped of their rights.

title: Behuli
plot: A young woman's upcoming marriage becomes a battleground between personal happiness and strict societal expectations, forcing her family to confront traditional dowry practices and the emotional weight of arranging a daughter's future.

title: Ma Yesto Geet Gauchhu 2
plot: An ambitious, talented young singer finds her personal life and rising career thrown into turmoil when she catches the attention of an obsessive, highly possessive lover whose erratic behavior threatens her safety and success.

title: Trembling Mountain
plot: The film follows the residents of Langtang village in upper Rasuwa district, Nepal, following their evacuation to Kathmandu in the aftermath of the April 2015 earthquake. Most residents are taken to a large Gelug monastery where they are slowly provided with basic shelter, limited food and negligible health care. The film maker interviews individuals suffering from the trauma with no psychological support and barely able to cope with the heat and low altitude. He follows the local cheesemaker when a group returns to their villages weeks later searching for bodies and livestock.

title: The Rickshaw Puller
plot: A hardworking, impoverished rickshaw puller navigates the harsh daily struggles and economic hardships of urban life while fighting to secure a better future for his family against systemic inequality.

title: Kohi Mero
plot: The search for that special person and the sacrifice it takes for us to show our love for each other.

title: Parivara
plot: Based on the true life stories of the children at the Goldungha Orphanage for the Blind in Nepal, Parivara is a positive and hopeful story following young Kopila through a fateful day in her life following the 2015 earthquake. It is a universal story demonstrating the beauty and resilience of the human spirit.

title: Pashupati Sharma: Lutna Sake Lut
plot: A satirical music video that uses sharp humor and social commentary to expose rampant corruption, bribery, and political unaccountability within administrative systems, reflecting the frustrations of ordinary citizens.

title: Fanko
plot: A driver named Bhakti Thapa is assigned a job to transport 1 crore rupees from Pokhara to Kathmandu. But people having this secret information are behind him to rob him when the chance comes.

title: Apabad
plot: The film depicts an encounter between Suyog (Rajballav Koirala) and his experiences in a lonely and secluded island after trying to escape his good for nothing fate. Facing the failures even before starting his career, Suyog decides to put an end to all his miseries. However, death betrays him and he reaches an isolated island where he faces a hard time for self survival. On the other hand, Sunanda(Nisha Adhikari), is a friend in need to Suyog. However, after the supposed demise of her friend, the sympathy turns into love as the lady reads the boy's personal diary. The protagonist is carried to an unknown island by the water waves where he struggles hard for survival. Finally, he wins over the loneliness and finds a way out of the abandoned land.

title: Laure
plot: A high-spirited comedy that follows the misadventures of an eccentric protagonist who finds himself entangled in a series of chaotic misunderstandings, humorous cultural clashes, and quirky schemes within his community.

title: Afno Ghar Afno Manche
plot: A close-knit family faces profound emotional and financial challenges when unexpected hardships and external societal pressures threaten to displace them from their ancestral home and fracture their core relationships.

title: Bicycle Dreams
plot: Bicycle Dreams follows two boys as they come of age in the ancient city of Kathmandu. Like kids the world over, they are pursuing a dream :an electric blue, 18 gear mountain bike. The boys can't possibly afford such a bike, but a poster offering a reward for finding a lost dog raises their hopes. The boys experience adventures and set back in their pursuit of dog and bike, through crowded alleys and market places of the old city, into inner sanctum of a prophetic seer, and to an abandoned temple where a 'holy' man steals their money. Overwhelmed by obstacles, their friendship is tested. Through the pursuit of their dreams, however, the boys discover what's really important in life-something bigger than the bicycle.

title: Dhukdhuki
plot: A passionate young couple faces intense familial opposition and class divides, forcing them to make heavy emotional sacrifices to keep their relationship alive against societal expectations.

title: Boyfriend
plot: A young woman's life becomes chaotic and emotionally complex when she finds herself caught between her family's traditional expectations and her tumultuous relationship with an unpredictable partner.

title: Hero Returns
plot: This is an action journey of Sabin Shrestha to uncover love of Rekha Thapa.

title: Hemant Rana: Nacha Maya
plot: A vibrant celebration of traditional love and local culture, where a spirited couple and their community come together through festive dance and music, overcoming distance and celebrating their bond during a joyful homecoming.

title: The Legend of Shankhadhar
plot: First animated feature film in Nepalbhasha/Nepali languages with English subtitles, is a biopic on Shankhadhar Shakhwa, who cleared everyone's debt and started Nepal's original era, Nepal Samvat, on 20th October 879 AD.

title: Saraswati
plot: A dedicated, idealistic school teacher in a rural village strives to bring education and literacy to marginalized children, facing fierce opposition from traditional local elites who feel threatened by the community's empowerment.

title: Bhool Bhulaiyaa
plot: A lighthearted romance that follows a young couple whose relationship is put to the test when a series of humorous misunderstandings and eccentric family interventions threaten to derail their wedding plans.

title: Ber Pipal
plot: Prabhakar and Devi love each other but due to their misfortune, their love story doesn't have a happy ending. Years later, when Prabhakar visits Devi's village, an unusual experience is waiting for him.

title: Batch No.16
plot: Ram and Guru are police officers who have proved themselves time and again of being trustworthy and capable. When an important mission comes up where the prospect of earning a quick buck is too lucrative to pass up, Guru decides to forgo the mission and get his hands on a large sum of money. Ram trying to stop his friend from making a big mistake escapes with the money only to take the police think he betrayed his country. As Ram struggles to prove his innocence and protect his family, Guru is hot and Ram's trail trying to claim what he thinks is rightfully his.

title: Between Matina
plot: Directed and Story by Pranab Joshi, Script and Screenplay by Susmita Maskey, Casting and Production by Prasanna Gopali, Assistant Direction by Raja Ram Nepal, Direction of photography and Screen play by Tom Kuggler, Cinematography and Camera by Ravi Sayami and Pranab Joshi, Edited by Sushil Neupane and Pranab Joshi. 'Between Matina' is a fictional thriller based in historic city of art and culture Patan. It deals with a story of two young girls aspired to become Living Goddess 'Kumari'. Matina and Kavita are best friends until Kavita gets selected as a 'Kumari' and she becomes a Goddess over the selection and Matina an ordinary girl's life, with shattered dream, takes a twist.

title: The Karma
plot: An intense action-thriller following a dedicated law enforcement officer who goes undercover to infiltrate a powerful cross-border criminal syndicate, leading to a high-stakes game of survival, betrayal, and ultimate retribution.

title: Seven Days in Nepal
plot: On the 25th of April, the Bajagain family of Nepal had everything: a house, farm, garden, cattle, and a happy life. But the earthquake that struck just before noon changed everything: the Bajagain family lost it all, even their vegetable garden.

title: Antaral
plot: A thoughtful drama tracking the parallel lives and emotional journeys of young individuals standing at a critical crossroads, as they navigate the immense pressure of career choices, identity crises, and societal expectations after completing their higher education.

title: Everest 3 Pass Trek
plot: An immersive documentary that captures the raw beauty and extreme physical toll of tackling one of the most challenging high-altitude circuits in the Himalayas, following trekkers as they navigate the breathtaking but treacherous Renjo La, Cho La, and Kongma La passes.

title: Chankhe Shankhe Pankhe
plot: The Nepali movie 'Chankhe Shankha Pankhe' was released in theater on September 25, 2015. The movie featuring Sudarshan Thapa in leading role is also produced and directed by himself with producer Santosh Sen Thakuri.

title: Krodh
plot: A gripping action-drama centered on an honest and hot-tempered protagonist who is pushed to his limits by local corruption and injustice, igniting a fierce quest for vengeance to protect his loved ones and restore righteousness.

title: Red Monsoon
plot: Inner city characters of the new Nepali generation struggle in a chaotic Kathmandu Valley society.

title: Himmat
plot: A powerful drama that centers on a resilient protagonist from an underprivileged background who finds the inner strength and courage to stand up against oppressive local forces, systemic corruption, and personal tragedy to secure justice for their community.

title: Ke Ma Timro Hoina Ra
plot: An intense romantic drama that follows a passionate young couple whose deep affection for each other is put to the ultimate test when they face severe opposition from their families and aggressive external conflicts, forcing them to fight for their love and identity.

title: Hairaan
plot: A fast-paced action-comedy that follows the chaotic misadventures of ordinary citizens who unexpectedly cross paths with a dangerous criminal underworld, resulting in a series of high-stakes chases, humorous misunderstandings, and explosive confrontations.

title: Nai Nabhannu La 5
plot: A touching romantic drama that explores the enduring power of innocent love across two generations, tracking the parallel emotional journeys of childhood sweethearts as they navigate deep loss, family expectations, and the unexpected ways their paths cross later in life.

title: Mirga Trishna
plot: A poignant drama that explores the elusive pursuit of happiness and success, following ambitious individuals who leave their rural hometowns for the city, only to discover that their grand dreams of wealth and fulfillment might just be an illusion.

title: Blue Kangling
plot: Tibetan Buddhist search for the meaning of death in an unforgiving Himalayan landscape and expose the core of human nature.

title: Kohalpur Express
plot: Kohalpur Express is a story about three women who try their luck with the same. What follows is a series of comical events, misfortunes and coincidences that only adds more misery to their already troubled lives.

title: Sambodhan
plot: A gritty crime drama that follows a dedicated, unyielding investigative journalist who risks everything to expose a massive web of political corruption and financial scams, ultimately sparking a tense legal and media battle against powerful societal elites.

title: Love You Baba
plot: Nepali movie 'Love You Baba' is an unique movie in the world - directed by an 8-years-old director. The director win the World Record an being the youngest film director in the world.

title: Jai Parshuram
plot: An action-packed mythological drama centered on a fierce, legendary warrior who rises to protect the righteous, wielding his immense strength and divine weapons to combat systemic tyranny, eradicate demonic forces, and restore justice to the realm.

title: Suntali
plot: Chinmaya Suberdani, the powerful matriarch of a sleepy village in Nepal, is preparing for her son's wedding when Suntali returns with a menacing foreigner in tow. Suntali befriends the village tailor, rekindles a relationship with Chinmaya's son Sundar, and armed with great resolve and sharp cunning Suntali deftly spins a web of deception, building up her vengeance against Chinmaya by getting the village men to do her bidding. As we find out why Suntali wants revenge, Chinmaya also wises up to Suntali's plot and initiates her own plan to destroy Suntali. Their feud will leave the hearts and minds of half of the village devastated, because only one of them will win.

title: Transforming the Present
plot: "There's nothing wrong with you. There's a lot wrong with the world you live in- Chris Colfer"- Transforming the Present"

title: Goodbye Kathmandu
plot: The movie is about stories of three people - a repatriate Computer Engineer, an aspiring musician and a school student in love - all torn by conflict between the Maoist opposition party and the Nepal King's government.

title: Badal Paree
plot: A poignant romantic drama that weaves a heartfelt tale of love and separation, following the emotional journey of individuals whose lives are deeply influenced by destiny and the simple, enduring bonds of their rural roots.

title: The Moon is Bright Tonight
plot: A dead body of a migrant worker arrives in a village of stone workers in southern part of Nepal. TATTINI, his recently wed wife and now widow, plans to escape and use the money from his insurance to start a new life but her father-in-law is determined to stop her from leaving with the insurance money of his dead son.

title: Marina
plot: Marina is a upcoming thriller movie having Aaryan Sigdel and Barsha Raut as lead.

title: 100 Kada 10
plot: A fast-paced comedy that centers on a series of hilarious financial misadventures, where a quirky group of individuals resorts to absurdly clever schemes and chaotic misunderstandings in a desperate, lighthearted race to secure quick money.

title: Chunauti
plot: An intense action-drama centered around an idealistic protagonist who issues an open challenge to a ruthless local crime lord, igniting a fierce and dangerous battle against systemic corruption to restore justice and safety to the community.

title: Kusume Rumal 2
plot: A heartfelt romantic drama that serves as a spiritual successor to a classic love story, tracking the emotional journey of a young couple whose deep bond is severely tested by deep-rooted family rivalries, class divides, and the complex burdens of past generation secrets.

title: Pasul Ascultarii
plot: In October 2013, Alex Gavan - explorer and alpine climber, who successfully climbed six times an 8,000 meters peak, invited me to participate in an expedition, through Larke La Pass, in Manaslu region, located in the Nepalese Himalayas, together with six other people I didn't know. All of them were successful people in different fields. We were all in search of unusual experiences, willing-fully choosing to test our endurance during our annual holiday. The result is a dramatic, comic and genuine discovery, in which I had the privilege to participate.

title: So Flo Floods
plot: Miami Beach is ground zero in the USA for Sea Level Rise (SLR), investing hundreds of millions of dollars to install pumps and other infrastructure to handle "King Tide" flooding and fight back the most immediate effects of global warming. But there is a much bigger story to be told of floods in South Florida including ancient--and future--floods. From Lake Okeechobee, to Stuart, to Belle Glade, to the Everglades, So Flo Floods tells the story of these floods and the issues surrounding where the region is going and what it will need to confront if SLR continues as anticipated. Not only is South Florida home to some of the most knowledgeable experts in the world on SLR, but also to many with related expertise that help So Flo Floods paint a picture of South Florida's economic, environmental, and political realities going forward. There are differences of opinion about what's to come and what to do about it-but not that it's here. We interview professors, mayors, writers, historians, engineers, and others and support their stories with archival and current footage, as well as animation and aerial footage captured over the past two years.

title: Lahana
plot: A beautifully woven romantic drama that explores the intricate bonds of love, sacrifice, and family honor, tracking a young woman caught in an emotional tug-of-war between her personal desires and the deep-seated cultural expectations of her community.

title: K Yo Maya Ho
plot: A heartfelt romantic drama that delves into the complexities of young love and relationships, following the lives of individuals who struggle to figure out if their deep affection is true love or merely a passing infatuation, while navigating personal misunderstandings and societal pressures.

title: Pachhis Basanta
plot: A poignant social drama spanning the passage of twenty-five years, reflecting on the changing landscape of a rural community and the personal growth of its inhabitants as they grapple with the evolving traditions, hardships, and resilience required to sustain family bonds through decades of upheaval.

title: Phulsiri
plot: One and a half months after the devastating earthquake reduced an entire village to rubble, and a ten-year-old girl longs for normality. News reaches her that school will re-open in a day and she is understandably overjoyed, but there is a hitch: she must first locate her shoes --- mandatory under new school rules --- in the debris that was once her home.

title: Dakshina
plot: A story about the life of a teacher who always preaches his students to be a good person in life.

title: Kanchi
plot: Add a Plot

title: Dokh
plot: After a few no-gooders from Salley village beat up a boy from a neighbouring village, a long-running feud over a contested forest flares up. With the insurgency at its peak, the rebel commander suggests this dispute be settled through a game of football. In the midst of all this tension a new teacher is appointed to the village school. Will this versatile stranger provide a solution or cause even more trouble?

title: Gaunthali
plot: A sweeping historical and social drama that delves into the rigid class structures and cultural traditions of rural society, following a resilient protagonist who bravely faces severe economic hardship, societal prejudices, and personal tragedy to protect their family and preserve their dignity.

title: Birkhelai Chinchhas
plot: A compelling social drama that follows a simple, unassuming villager who suddenly finds himself in the spotlight when he inadvertently challenges local authority figures, forcing his entire community to re-examine their values, loyalties, and the true meaning of courage.

title: Bansuri
plot: A lyrical romantic drama that captures the quiet beauty and emotional depth of young love blossoming in a serene rural setting, following two individuals whose deep bond is beautifully expressed through the universal language of music, even as they face the traditional expectations and silent hardships of village life.

title: Kaha Bhetiyela
plot: A moving social drama that explores the profound themes of separation and long-awaited reunions, tracing the emotional lives of two people whose deep connection is severed by unexpected hardships, forcing them onto separate, difficult paths while clinging to the hope of finding each other once again.

title: Green Blood
plot: An insightful documentary that delves into the organic health revolution and alternative medicine movements, tracking the rising popularity, scientific curiosity, and profound clinical potential of wheatgrass therapy—affectionately dubbed "green blood"—as individuals around the world turn back to nature to rejuvenate and heal their bodies.

title: Hifajat
plot: A gripping romantic drama that follows a wealthy, rebellious young woman who willfully alienates herself from her protective father and inadvertently falls into a dangerous web of betrayal after befriending a charming thief. Left exposed to severe risks, she must rely on the unwavering loyalty of a disciplined ex-army bodyguard, who vows to protect her as they embark on a perilous, life-altering journey that completely reshapes her understanding of trust, family, and true love.

title: Purano Bullet
plot: A gritty, realistic drama that explores the challenges of youthful rebellion, community identity, and modern transitions in rural Nepal. The narrative centers on a restless young man heavily tied to his local identity—symbolized by his classic Royal Enfield Bullet motorcycle—who must navigate personal accountability, changing family dynamics, and the harsh socio-economic realities that force a generation to choose between their ancestral roots and the uncertain promise of a foreign land.

title: Tandav
plot: When an arms deal on the Nepal India border goes south, a group of traveler's in a border hotel must band together to survive the resulting siege.

title: Babu
plot: A ten year-old kid tries his best to salvage what is left of his family when his home in Nepal is torn apart by an earthquake.

title: Timi Hunchha Bhana Audio
plot: A sweeping romantic drama that explores the profound depths of true love and devotion, following a young couple who must navigate a vast ocean of emotional trials, deep-rooted family expectations, and bitter rivalries that threaten to tear them apart.

title: Jindagani
plot: A deeply moving social drama that explores the intricate web of life's daily struggles, sacrifices, and moral dilemmas within a changing society. The story follows ordinary individuals as they navigate the harsh realities of economic hardship and family responsibilities, capturing the resilience of the human spirit and the enduring power of relationships in the face of adversity.

title: Love Love Love
plot: Man hopes to get a girlfriend which he loves but he ends up in friend zone.

title: Lalteen
plot: Lalteen is a movie that illustrates the criminal activities of gangs and their way of life in the city. Guns and violence are daily rituals of gang members and innocent people are victimised. Lalteen visualises the hardship when involved with criminals and the result is mostly terrible.

title: Shiris ko Phool
plot: Story of a runaway soldier during the World War 2 who is attracted by a girl 16 years younger than him.

title: The Human Face
plot: An engaging and insightful talk-show program that brings together leading experts, psychologists, and cultural commentators to explore the multi-faceted nature of human expressions and interpersonal communication. Each episode focuses on how our facial features reflect identity, project emotions, and shape our social connections, offering viewers a fascinating look at the science and art behind the most expressive part of our bodies.

title: Aadhi Beri
plot: A love story between an untouchable woman and a high caste Brahmin man.

title: King Returns
plot: A high-octane action drama that follows a powerful, legendary figure who returns from exile or a long absence to reclaim his territory and protect his people. Facing ruthless criminal syndicates, corrupt authority figures, and a wave of lawlessness that has overtaken his former home, he must rely on his exceptional martial arts skills, street smarts, and unwavering sense of justice to clean up the streets and restore order, all while protecting those he loves from imminent danger.

title: 1 Percent
plot: 2015, illegal and uncontrolled sex-trade is leading to a huge number of HIV infections. Sammy, a decent guy with a decent life is bored while his wife is away. He hesitantly decides to buy sex to kill his boredom. Everything goes well until he realizes that is condom has broken. The only thing that scares him more than possibly being infected with HIV is that he might transfer the disease to his wife. Medical science cannot give him the peace of mind quick enough so he takes it upon himself to find out his and his wife's fate. His hoped journey to HIV negative takes us through the darker side of the holy city, Kathmandu, Nepal, giving viewers a new perspective on fate and decision.

title: Karodpati
plot: A captivating romantic drama infused with lighthearted humor and social commentary, tracking the unexpected journey of a young man from humble beginnings who suddenly finds himself thrust into immense wealth and high society. As he navigates his new life as a multi-millionaire, he must balance the superficial allure of sudden fortune with his genuine affection for a strong-willed woman, ultimately forcing him to discover whether money can truly buy happiness or the respect of the person he loves most.

title: Project Rockin' High
plot: An honest and warm documentary that follows the middle-aged members of the Finnish hard rock band Ancara over a tumultuous two-year period. Struggling to break through in the mainstream music industry and deemed "over-aged" by traditional record labels, the band risks everything on a boisterous, borderline impossible mission: to travel to Nepal and perform at the Mount Everest base camp to secure a Guinness World Record for the highest rock gig in history. Balancing incredible logistical mess-ups, unexpected sponsorship setbacks, and intense physical demands, the film paints a poignant and often humorous portrait of resilience, friendship, and the lengths musicians will go to keep their creative dreams alive.

title: A Woman of Merit
plot: A poignant short drama that captures a brief but profound encounter, reflecting on the unrecognized strength and resilience of a woman navigating societal constraints. The narrative distills the complexities of personal integrity and the quiet sacrifices made in everyday life into a brief, powerful meditation on what it truly means to be a person of merit.

title: Jiwan Kanda Ki Phool
plot: An inspiring biographical drama based on the highly acclaimed, visionary autobiography of Jhamak Ghimire, a distinguished Nepali writer born with cerebral palsy. The film beautifully chronicles her extraordinary childhood and resilient journey, depicting how she overcame immense physical challenges, societal neglect, and severe communication barriers to teach herself to read and write using her left foot. It stands as a powerful, deeply moving tribute to the human spirit, literature, and the triumph of sheer determination over adversity.

title: Jadugar 2
plot: A slapstick Nepali comedy that follows the chaotic misadventures of a whimsical, eccentric lead character—subtitled *Joker*—who tries to navigate daily life with a blend of amateur magic, bumbling street smarts, and pure luck. Alongside a colorful cast of local villagers and quirky sidekicks, his poorly executed tricks and constant misunderstandings land him in hot water with local authority figures, triggering a wave of lighthearted trouble, chaotic chase sequences, and laugh-out-loud situations across the community.

title: Saayad
plot: The movie 'Saayad' is the story of two brothers Yodin (played by Samyam Puri) and Nirag (played by Sunil Rawal). After Yodin was born, their family had earned wealth and their life became more easier so Nirag considers Yodin a luck. Yodin's crush, Sirish, was the sister of Nirag's crush, Samridhi. Yodin's best friend Ved (played by Wilson Bikram Rai) introduced Yodin to drugs. Yodin and Ved's group started taking drugs because of the problems in the family and love lives. Drugs caused them to neglect their study and get involved in gang fights. The story takes a u-turn when Sirish died. It is better to keep from telling, all about how Sirish died and how their lives changed after her death, not to spoil your movie experience in the theatre.

title: Tata Bye Bye
plot: A banana merchant turned publisher with the help of pen and sword declares a personal war against the system, influenced by malignant corruption.

title: Nepal its Business Unusual
plot: An inspiring travel documentary short that highlights the resilience, enduring spirit, and vibrant culture of Nepal in the wake of the devastating 2015 earthquake. Aimed at revitalizing the country's vital tourism industry, the film captures how everyday life, local commerce, and the majestic Himalayan landscapes quickly adapted to welcome global travelers back, proving that despite the immense tragedy, it was "business unusual" as the nation stood ready to rebuild and share its beauty with the world once more.

title: Untouchable Love
plot: A poignant and hard-hitting documentary that exposes the severe socio-cultural realities of the caste system in rural Nepal, focusing on the harrowing experiences of inter-caste couples. Told entirely through raw, personal interviews without voiceover, the film tracks the lives of young lovers who braved deep-rooted prejudice by eloping across untouchable (Dalit) and high-caste lines. By documenting the violent backlash, community banishments, legal battles, and profound systemic threats faced by these couples, the narrative delivers an intimate, eye-opening exploration of human rights, generational rebellion, and the heavy price of choosing love over ancient social divisions.

title: Zhigrana
plot: Christine Summers has been working in an NGO in Nepal for the past four years. Her boss assigns her to do a last mission in Ruku to collect information of the life outside of the cities, before she leaves for the United States. Leaving for the mission with her crew and her guide; they take shelter in a small village called Zhigrana; an area known for a killer on the loose who sacrifices humans in the name of Kaal Panchami, a mythical ghost. When they start to turn against each other regarding a death of a friend and with no one to trust: it is now up to Christine to figure out who the killer is. Is it the ghost of Kaal Panchami or is the truth even stranger than that?

title: Raja
plot: A socially-rooted police procedural, a race-against-time thriller, as well as a portrait of Nepal, a complex society on the edge of a new future.

title: Shankar
plot: A high-octane Nepali action drama that follows Shankar (Rajesh Hamal), a righteous and fierce young man who stands as a shield for the poor and oppressed in his community. When a ruthless local crime lord and corrupt elites threaten the village, tearing families apart through exploitation and violence, Shankar is pushed to his absolute limits. Armed with an unyielding sense of justice and explosive martial arts prowess, he wages a one-man war against systemic tyranny to restore peace and protect the people he loves, solidifying his legacy as a legendary folk hero.

title: Fateko Jutta 2
plot: A vibrant romantic drama and sequel that follows the chaotic yet endearing journey of its working-class protagonists as they try to build a life together after the wild misadventures of the past. Set against the backdrop of the Nepal-India border towns, the story explores the tests of a modern relationship when economic ambitions, local neighborhood eccentricities, and unexpected misunderstandings threaten to drift them apart, proving that stitching together a shared future requires far more than just luck.

title: Beauty and Brains
plot: Would you enter a beauty contest to prevent abuse being part of your everyday life? Especially if by entering, you could lose your friends, family and education. That was what the third-genders of Nepal were prepared to do.

title: Dhanda
plot: A guy who losses his self esteem while perusing his dream on migrating overseas. He loses his sanity on waking up in the hospital.

title: Maya Ko Sansar
plot: A police officer, is investigating a missing case of Maya that has only two prime witnesses, Neeta and another one Marco is the prime suspects. With story unfolds the narratives about the events of the fateful night we see the world of illusion a world of Maya; let love defeat the love, let love live forever.

title: 16 Barse Yoban Salala Bage Jasto
plot: A nostalgic and visually expressive short musical film that captures the vibrant energy, romance, and fleeting nature of youth. Set against beautiful, scenic landscapes, the narrative follows Kumud Pant and a young couple experiencing the exhilarating highs of first love and early adulthood. Symbolized by the classic Nepali phrasing of "sixteen-year-old youth flowing like a rapid river," the film gracefully balances a joyful celebration of romance with a bittersweet reflection on how quickly time washes away the most passionate years of life.

title: On the Road with the Red God: Machhendranath
plot: A deeply immersive documentary tracking the chaotic, awe-inspiring Rato Machhendranath Jatra festival in Patan, Nepal. The film captures thousands of devotees pulling a massive, thirty-ton wooden chariot through narrow streets, exploring the profound communal bonds, logistics, and ancient traditions keeping this rain-god ritual alive.

title: Challenge
plot: Add a PlotA high-octane Nepali action drama following a fearless protagonist who stands up against a powerful, corrupt criminal syndicate terrorizing his community. Armed with martial arts prowess and an unyielding sense of justice, he faces escalating dangers to protect his loved ones and clean up the streets.

title: Rhythm
plot: A melodious Nepali romantic drama that explores the intricate rhythm of love, heartbreak, and emotional healing. The story follows a passionate young couple whose relationship is put to the ultimate test by family expectations, societal pressures, and unexpected misunderstandings, forcing them to find a harmonious balance between their personal dreams and shared future.

title: Daag
plot: A gripping Nepali drama exploring themes of love, betrayal, and deep emotional scars. The film follows its central characters as their lives become entangled in societal pressure, family conflicts, and misunderstandings, forcing them to confront painful pasts and make sacrifices to heal their wounded relationships.

title: Maan
plot: A touching Nepali family drama that explores the complexities of human relationships, pride, and social standing. The narrative focuses on the emotional trials of its protagonists as they navigate intense familial expectations, personal sacrifices, and the moral dilemmas of maintaining individual honor (*Maan*) within a traditional society.

title: Bses Slwl I: The Musical Journey
plot: This film is totally based on the Biography of the artist Bses Slwl I. It shows his struggle from a underground singer/rapper becoming a main stream rapper/singer. During the process there are cerain events which made his progress more delayed.

title: Mahamaya
plot: A poignant Nepali drama that explores the deep emotional resilience of a maternal figure facing intense domestic and societal challenges. Set against a traditional backdrop, the film follows her struggles to preserve family unity, protect her children, and maintain her dignity in the face of betrayal, economic hardship, and rigid social expectations.

title: Akaal
plot: A compelling Nepali social drama starring Rajesh Hamal, Rekha Thapa, and Nir Shah. Directed by Nir Shah, the film delves into intense regional conflicts and societal struggles, exploring themes of justice, personal sacrifice, and individual resilience within a deeply traditional and challenging environment.

title: Rudane
plot: Based on Nepalese politician Rup Chandra Bista.

title: Ainaa Jhyaal Ko Putali
plot: For the first time in her life, Bidhya, a meritorious young girl, does not top her class and loses a scholarship to study further in the nearest town. But Bidhya does not give up. She finds out that if a student's writing has been published in a national magazine, there's still a chance of winning money that will help her to study further. With help from her younger brother Basanta, Bidhya submits a poem to a national child magazine. Unbeknownst to her, Bidhya's poem gets published in it. When Basanta gets to know of this news, he strives to find the magazine that he knows will get Bidhya the scholarship, and change their lives forever.

title: The Winner
plot: THE WINNER captures the untold stories of Organized Crime and their families as it follows the journey across Australia and Nepal.

title: Mystic Mountain
plot: The story of a young Tibetan man who must solve the mystery of disappearance of his father's corpse.

title: Swor-The Melody of Dreams
plot: A musical family drama that is about a singer. SWOR is all about friendship, relationship with family, aims and life as a whole.

title: Mle Kyu
plot: A lighthearted romantic drama following a charming but ordinary young man whose life takes a dramatic turn when he suddenly comes into immense wealth, forcing him to navigate the complexities of high society, family expectations, and the true meaning of love versus material success.

title: Pardeshi
plot: A poignant family drama that sheds light on the painful socio-economic realities of foreign employment in Nepal, following a young man who leaves his rural village and beloved family to work in the Gulf region, highlighting the immense emotional toll, sacrifices, and hardships endured by migrant workers and the families they leave behind.

title: Shree Swosthani
plot: The first Nepali mythological film based on the epic, Shree Swosthani.

title: Nostalgia Musical
plot: Two childhood friends and lovers get separated by time and space but they still feel surrounded by each other all the time. The closeness and the proximity between has nothing to do with distance.

title: Gorkha rakshyak
plot: The martial arts sensation, Shuny Bee, strikes the city of Kathmandu as the Gorkha Protector, to stop the human trafficking of young innocent girls. Although it is a fiction movie, it is based on what is happening in real life situations for a long time in country of Nepal. He pledges to bring an end to this evil vice that has plagued his hometown. His dedication, determination and discipline play an important role to take down the gang lord of the trade market and bring peace and harmony to the city. An action packed drama for human rights with no wires, no animation, and no special effects!

title: Iku the Jungle Man
plot: A small boy got kidnap, taken to the Jungle and asked for ransom from his Family but the Iku (Tarzan) who lives in the jungle save the boy from the kidnappers.

title: Khaag
plot: Based on the real-life memoir of a park warden, this gripping biographical drama follows a dedicated conservation official's intense and dangerous crusade against armed poaching syndicates to protect the endangered one-horned rhinoceros in Chitwan National Park.

title: Buhari
plot: A touching family drama that explores the profound struggles, emotional sacrifices, and resilience of a newlywed daughter-in-law navigating the complex relationships, rigid traditions, and high expectations within her husband's joint family household.

title: Hello Jindagi
plot: A dramatic narrative following a group of non-resident Nepalis living abroad who must navigate personal identity crises, emotional struggles, and complex relationship dynamics while striving to find meaning and purpose far away from their homeland.

title: Happy Days
plot: A romantic drama following a classic love triangle set among the Nepali diaspora in the United Kingdom, where a young man finds his path to happiness and love complicated by legal immigration struggles, financial hardships, and deep emotional sacrifices.

title: Chauka Dau
plot: A lively comedy centering on four eccentric older men who all fall for the same beautiful young woman in their neighborhood, leading to a series of hilarious misadventures, chaotic schemes, and friendly rivalries as they each try to win her heart.

title: In Search of a Nation
plot: 2014, according to the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees there are 51.2 million people forcibly displaced across the world. Among them, 120,000 refugees are from Bhutan.

title: Badhshala
plot: Badhshala is a story of torture inside an army barrack during maoist insurgency.

title: Dipendra Sarkar
plot: The movie revolves around a forbidden love story or a concealed Massacre Mystery.

title: Aadha Love
plot: People show how love can betrayed and turning your true love to half love.

title: Langtang
plot: Langtang is an ode to life, a tribute to hope and a search for new horizons.

title: Chhodi Gaye Paap Lagla
plot: A classic, emotionally charged romantic drama centering on two deeply devoted lovers whose relationship is shattered by severe familial opposition, forcing them to make tragic personal sacrifices and navigate a painful separation that tests the very limits of their emotional resilience.

title: Wasfia
plot: Wasfia Nazreen doesn't just climb for the thrill; she climbs for a cause. The first Bangladeshi to scale the Seven Summits, Wasfia has made it her purpose to brave these climbs for the sake of something larger - for the women of Bangladesh.

title: Counterpart
plot: A boy witnesses strange activities occurring in his house.

title: Khai O Mheetheba
plot: A poignant drama centered around the complex social landscape, personal struggles, and cultural traditions of a tight-knit community, exploring the emotional choices individuals must make when their deep personal desires clash with generational expectations and changing times.

title: Cops
plot: A gritty crime drama following a team of dedicated law enforcement officers who face immense personal sacrifices and systemic corruption as they work tirelessly on the front lines to maintain law and order and dismantle dangerous criminal networks.

title: Journey to Yarsa
plot: To pay their debts, a family makes a treacherous journey on Himalayas to pick yarsagumba, a highly valued fungus-larvae used in Chinese medicine.

title: Rahadani
plot: The story of thousands of youth who goes to golf countries and Malaysia whereas that youth is not other than from least developed country Nepal, furthermore, characterize the cause and reason for foreign employment.

title: Deepak Bajracharya: Man Magan
plot: Man Magan is a reflection of the culture, tradition and heritage of Nepal.

title: Pratibimba
plot: PRATIBIMBA Every person in this world has dreams and aspirations that they want to fulfill. Pratibimba is the story of Nikhil, who like any one of us has dreams and aspirations and lives his life to see it come true. He longs to meet a person who sees life the way he does and understands him. Life has enough obstacles and is not easy for us to live and new struggles come upon us, however we overcome them and forge on. Unlike us normal people, Nikhil has a handicap and cannot see the world like we do. He sees the goodness of the soul as compared to the superficial things that we normal people dwell on. This is a romantic story of how all his life Nikhil searched for his destiny and finds it one day.

title: Bansulli
plot: A journey of hopes and desires, against the social stigma that still prevails in Nepal.

title: Lamphoo
plot: A compelling social drama tracking the turbulent journey of a young man from a rural village who travels to the city full of ambitious dreams, only to face harsh urban realities, exploitation, and systemic challenges that force him to reevaluate his values and true identity.

title: Jeevan Saathi
plot: A heartfelt romantic drama centered on the profound meaning of companionship, following a devoted couple who must brave severe societal prejudice, class divides, and unexpected hardships to protect their sacred bond and build a life together.

title: Kahi Katai
plot: Add a PlotA heartwarming family drama that explores the intricate dynamics of love and relationships, following individuals across different generations as they navigate personal sacrifices, emotional longings, and the enduring power of family bonds in a changing world.

title: Madhu Malati
plot: A classic romantic drama that traces the emotional journey of two deeply devoted lovers from different social backgrounds, navigating intense familial opposition, societal expectations, and personal sacrifices to protect their bond against all odds.

title: Tulashi
plot: Story revolves around Tulashi and Shivam which are the main characters and dispute among high caste and low cast communities and relation between the people in a society seen in Nepal.

title: Aavash
plot: A man after heavy depressing breakup he starts to fall for two girls, he has to choose among them but who'll it choose between them? .

title: Superhit
plot: A suspenseful thriller following an ambitious young protagonist whose high-stakes pursuit of wealth and fame leads them down a dark path of manipulation, betrayal, and unforeseen psychological consequences as their rapidly constructed empire begins to unravel.

title: Manai Ta Ho
plot: A romantic drama that explores the intricate complexities of the human heart, following the emotional journeys of its central characters as they navigate love, misunderstandings, and personal sacrifices while struggling to align their deepest personal desires with familial and societal expectations.

title: Santan
plot: A poignant social drama revolving around the lives of parents and their children, exploring the emotional conflicts that arise when modern ambitions clash with traditional filial obligations, and the ultimate sacrifices made to preserve family honor and protect future generations.

title: Sushant Pradhan
plot: A sports-focused reality feature profiling the professional journey and athletic training regime of Nepali fitness icon Sushant Pradhan, documenting the dedication, physical conditioning, and mindset required to compete and thrive in the regional sports and fitness landscape.

title: Conserving World Heritage Site, Patan Durbar Square
plot: The beauty of the UNESCO World Heritage Site Patan Durbar Square is in jeopardy as the new urban buildings tend to take away the art and the beauty of the place. UNESCO comes up with some solution and ITFPA tries to implement through documentary.

title: Nepal's Mega Cinestar
plot: Nepal's Mega Cinestar Rise through the millions is a Television Base reality show with the idea of finding raw talent all over Nepal and compete them. Funding will be done via audition and we have outreach of 7 best places in Nepal including Kathmandu and Pokhara. Nepal's Mega Cinestar specially look for the people who has talent on screen or people who are talent on screen task, such as acting, dancing, ramp walk and modeling. After finding the talent we will compete them to the nationwide talents who had been selected from all over Nepal. The approximate length of this program will be 27 episodes and each episode will be 60 minutes long. There will be multiple selection round conducted by judges and each contestant will have to pass each round in order to win the competition.

title: Utsav
plot: Singers original songs get stolen so his friends try to credit him.

title: Save Gangamaya
plot: A mum the world's mums can be proud of: Nepal's Gangamaya Adhikari has been fighting relentlessly for justice for her murdered teenage son over ten years now.

title: Aago
plot: An intense, politically charged action drama set against the backdrop of civil unrest and rebellion, capturing the chaotic struggles, personal costs, and ideological clashes of youth caught up in an explosive sociopolitical movement.

title: Supermonk
plot: The journey of an eleven years old monk, who finds his way of applying the Buddha's teachings of compassion and joy in an unconventional way

title: Maynati: Poetry Against Modern Day Slavery
plot: An evocative documentary that uses the power of spoken word, lyricism, and verse to expose the harrowing realities of modern-day human trafficking and forced labor, illuminating the personal stories of survivors while delivering an urgent global call to action against systematic exploitation.

title: Take the Lead
plot: A school science teacher lost his child from carbon-monoxide poisoning. He now fights to save the environment.

title: Kathabhitra ka Kathaharo
plot: Reaching Across Borders Project on HIV/AIDS and migration in West Nepal.

title: Chhintang 2036 B.S.
plot: In the year 2036 B.S (1979 A.D), 16 people from Chhintang, a remote village in eastern Nepal were killed. At the time, Nepal was a monarch, and a party less Panchayat system of government prevailed. Any kind of resistance against the government was subject to harsh treatment - the Chhintang incident being an example. Today, almost 40 years later, the story needs to be retold - we no longer live under the Panchayat System and Aawaaj believes the state should recognize the resistance of these 16. Grant them the status of 'National Martyrs'.

title: Duplicity
